name: Service Installation with Driver in User Directory via Command Line
description: A service was installed via sc.exe or sc create command with a binPath pointing to a driver file (.sys) located in a user directory. This technique is commonly used in BYOVD (Bring Your Own Vulnerable Driver) attacks for privilege escalation or defense evasion.

rules.name: Service Installation with Driver in User Directory via Command Line

author: Yusuf Madkour & Mahmoud Soheem
